L2().details: Sets up the L2 contracts. Depends on `L1()` being called first.

disableUpgradedFork().details: Disables upgrade mode for testing. By default the fork testing env will be upgraded to the latest      implementation. This can be used to disable the upgrade which, is useful for tests targeting the upgrade      process itself.

enableAltDA().details: Enables alternative data availability mode for testing

returnIfForkTest(string).details: Returns early when running against a forked production network. Useful for allowing a portion of a test      to run.

skipIfCoverage().details: Skips tests when running in coverage mode.

skipIfForkTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network.

skipIfOpsRepoTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network using the superchain ops repo.

params._randomCaller: The address that will call the function - used to fuzz better since the behaviour should be                       the same regardless of the caller.

params._guy: The address of the spender - It cannot be Permit2.
params._randomCaller: The address that will call the function - used to fuzz better                       since the behaviour should be the same regardless of the caller.

params._amount: The amount of WETH to send.

params._wad: The amount of WETH to transfer.
The amount of WETH to transfer.

params._amount: The amount of WETH to send.

artifacts().notice: The address of the Artifacts contract. Set into state by Deployer.setUp() with `etch` to avoid         mutating any nonces. MUST not have constructor logic.

isForkTest().notice: Indicates whether a test is running against a forked production network.

testFuzz_allowance_fromPermit2_succeeds(.notice: Tests that the allowance function returns the max uint256 value when the spender is Permit.

testFuzz_allowance_succeeds(address,addr.notice: Tests that the allowance function returns the correct allowance when the spender is not Permit.

testFuzz_calling_burnFunction_reverts(ad.notice: Test that the burn function reverts to protect against accidentally changing the visibility.

testFuzz_calling_internalBurnFunction_re.notice: Test that the internal burn function reverts to protect against accidentally changing the visibility.

testFuzz_calling_internalMintFunction_re.notice: Test that the internal mint function reverts to protect against accidentally changing the visibility.

testFuzz_calling_mintFunction_reverts(ad.notice: Test that the mint function reverts to protect against accidentally changing the visibility.

testFuzz_crosschainBurn_callerNotBridge_.notice: Tests the `crosschainBurn` function reverts when the caller is not the `SuperchainTokenBridge`.

testFuzz_crosschainBurn_insufficientBala.notice: Tests that the `crosschainBurn` function reverts when called with insufficient balance.

testFuzz_crosschainBurn_succeeds(address.notice: Tests the `crosschainBurn` with non custom gas token burns the amount and emits the `CrosschainBurn` event.

testFuzz_crosschainMint_callerNotBridge_.notice: Tests the `crosschainMint` function reverts when the caller is not the `SuperchainTokenBridge`.

testFuzz_crosschainMint_fromBridge_succe.notice: Tests the `crosschainMint` with non custom gas token succeeds and emits the `CrosschainMint` event.

testFuzz_deposit_succeeds(uint256).notice: Tests that the deposit function can be called on a non-custom gas token chain.

testFuzz_relayETH_notCrossDomainSender_r.notice: Tests the `relayETH` function reverts when the `crossDomainMessageSender` that sent the message is not the same SuperchainWETH.

testFuzz_relayETH_notMessenger_reverts(a.notice: Tests the `relayETH` function reverts when the caller is not the L2ToL2CrossDomainMessenger.

testFuzz_relayETH_succeeds(address,addre.notice: Tests the `relayETH` function relays the proper amount of ETH and emits the `RelayETH` event.

testFuzz_sendETH_succeeds(address,addres.notice: Tests the `sendETH` function burns the sender ETH, sends the message, and emits the `SendETH` event.

testFuzz_sendETH_zeroAddressTo_reverts(a.notice: Tests the `sendETH` function reverts when the address `_to` is zero.

testFuzz_supportInterface_works(bytes4).notice: Tests that the `supportsInterface` function returns false for any other interface than the `IERC7802` one.

testFuzz_transferFrom_whenPermit2IsCalle.notice: Tests that `transferFrom` works when the caller (spender) is Permit2, and `_src` equals `_dst` without         an explicit approval.         The balance should remain the same on this scenario.
Tests that `transferFrom` works when the caller (spender) is Permit2, without any explicit approval.

testFuzz_withdraw_succeeds(uint256).notice: Tests that the withdraw function can be called on a non-custom gas token chain.

test_supportInterface_succeeds().notice: Tests that the `supportsInterface` function returns true for the `IERC7802` interface.

CrosschainBurn(address,uint256,address).notice: Emitted when a crosschain transfer burns tokens.

CrosschainMint(address,uint256,address).notice: Emitted when a crosschain transfer mints tokens.

Deposit(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when a deposit is made.

Transfer(address,address,uint256).notice: Emitted when a transfer is made.

Withdrawal(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when a withdrawal is made.
